requirement_topic.en: Electricity Business Act — Technical Standards for Electrical Installations
requirement_topic.zh: 电气事业法 — 电气设备技术标准
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣事業法 — 電氣設備技術標準

summary.en: Japan's Electricity Business Act (電気事業法), administered by METI, sets mandatory technical standards for electrical installations including self-generating and storage equipment. The Act's subordinate regulations — the Technical Standards for Electrical Equipment (電気設備に関する技術基準, Ministerial Ordinance) — establish safety and operational requirements for electrical installations above a threshold voltage/capacity. BESS used in conjunction with on-site or grid-connected electrical systems must comply with these technical standards. Pre-use self-inspections (使用前自主検査) by the facility owner or a qualified inspector are required for designated installations. METI regional bureaus (産業保安監督部) oversee compliance.
summary.zh: 日本《电气事业法》由经济产业省（METI）负责管理，对包括自发电和储能设备在内的电气装置设定了强制性技术标准。该法的下位法规——《电气设备技术标准》（电気設備に関する技術基準，省令）——为超过一定电压/容量阈值的电气装置建立了安全和运行要求。与现场或并网电气系统配套使用的BESS须符合上述技术标准。指定装置须由设施所有者或具资质的检查员进行使用前自主检查（使用前自主検査）。METI地方经济产业保安监督部负责监督合规情况。
summary.zht: 日本《電氣事業法》由經濟產業省（METI）負責管理，對包括自發電和儲能設備在內的電氣裝置設定了強制性技術標準。該法的下位法規——《電氣設備技術標準》（電気設備に関する技術基準，省令）——為超過一定電壓/容量閾值的電氣裝置建立了安全和運行要求。與現場或並網電氣系統配套使用的BESS須符合上述技術標準。指定裝置須由設施所有者或具資質的檢查員進行使用前自主檢查（使用前自主検査）。METI地方經濟產業保安監督部負責監督合規情況。

standards_or_laws: 電気事業法 (Electricity Business Act) — administered by METI
電気設備に関する技術基準 (Technical Standards for Electrical Equipment) — METI Ministerial Ordinance
電気設備の技術基準の解釈 (Interpretation of Technical Standards for Electrical Installations) — METI technical guidance

summary.en: China regulates grid-connected ESS technical requirements through GB/T 36558-2022 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems) and grid operator technical specifications. Project approval is obtained through the National Development and Reform Commission (NDRC) and the National Energy Administration (NEA), with grid connection approval granted by the relevant grid operator (State Grid or CSG). The Chinese regulatory pathway (centralized government and grid-operator approval) differs structurally from Japan's Electricity Business Act inspection-based compliance system.
summary.zh: 中国通过GB/T 36558-2022（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和电网运营商技术规范规制并网储能系统的技术要求。项目审批通过国家发展和改革委员会（NDRC）和国家能源局（NEA）进行，并网批准由相关电网运营商（国家电网或南方电网）授予。中国监管路径（集中式政府和电网运营商审批）在结构上与日本《电气事业法》基于检查的合规体系不同。
summary.zht: 中國通過GB/T 36558-2022（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和電網運營商技術規範規制並網儲能系統的技術要求。項目審批通過國家發展和改革委員會（NDRC）和國家能源局（NEA）進行，並網批准由相關電網運營商（國家電網或南方電網）授予。中國監管路徑（集中式政府和電網運營商審批）在結構上與日本《電氣事業法》基於檢查的合規體系不同。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2022 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General technical requirements for electrochemical energy storage systems)
GB/T 36547-2018 — 电化学储能系统接入电网技术规定 (Technical requirements for electrochemical energy storage system connected to power grid)

gap.en: Japan's Electricity Business Act imposes a domestic technical standards compliance and self-inspection obligation that applies to BESS installations regardless of their country of manufacture. Chinese GB/T 36558 technical compliance documentation does not satisfy the Electricity Business Act inspection requirements. The BESS system must comply with Japanese technical standards (電気設備に関する技術基準) and the facility owner must complete mandatory pre-use self-inspections. Compliance must be demonstrated by qualified Japanese electrical engineers.
gap.zh: 日本《电气事业法》对储能安装设施规定了国内技术标准合规和自主检查义务，该义务适用于所有BESS安装，与制造国无关。中国GB/T 36558技术合规文件不满足《电气事业法》的检查要求。BESS系统须符合日本技术标准（电気設備に関する技術基準），设施所有者须完成强制性使用前自主检查。合规情况须由具资质的日本电气工程师证明。
gap.zht: 日本《電氣事業法》對儲能安裝設施規定了國內技術標準合規和自主檢查義務，該義務適用於所有BESS安裝，與製造國無關。中國GB/T 36558技術合規文件不滿足《電氣事業法》的檢查要求。BESS系統須符合日本技術標準（電気設備に関する技術基準），設施所有者須完成強制性使用前自主檢查。合規情況須由具資質的日本電氣工程師證明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for electrical installations above threshold capacity under the Electricity Business Act; threshold values must be confirmed with METI regional bureau
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory compliance with GB/T 36558-2022 and grid operator specifications for grid-connected ESS; approval through NDRC/NEA and grid operator

source.publisher: Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry (METI), Japan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese BESS installed in Japan must comply with Japanese Electricity Business Act technical standards and pre-use self-inspection obligations. Chinese GB/T 36558 documentation does not substitute. Engage qualified Japanese electrical engineers and METI regional bureau consultation before installation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在日本安装的中国BESS须符合日本《电气事业法》技术标准和使用前自主检查义务。中国GB/T 36558文件不能替代。安装前须聘请具资质的日本电气工程师并咨询METI地方局。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在日本安裝的中國BESS須符合日本《電氣事業法》技術標準和使用前自主檢查義務。中國GB/T 36558文件不能替代。安裝前須聘請具資質的日本電氣工程師並諮詢METI地方局。

requirement_topic.en: Grid Interconnection — JEAC 9701 Grid Interconnection Code
requirement_topic.zh: 并网互联 — JEAC 9701 系统连系技术要件
requirement_topic.zht: 並網互聯 — JEAC 9701 系統連系技術要件

summary.en: Grid-connected BESS in Japan must comply with the Grid Interconnection Technical Requirements Guidelines (系統連系技術要件ガイドライン, commonly referred to as JEAC 9701), which is published by the Japan Electric Association and referenced by METI. JEAC 9701 sets technical requirements for connecting distributed generation and storage systems to the utility grid, covering protection relay settings, voltage regulation, frequency response, disconnection requirements, and anti-islanding. Formal interconnection approval must be obtained from the local utility (transmission system operator) before commissioning. For large-scale grid-connected storage above certain thresholds, additional METI approval under the Electricity Business Act may be required.
summary.zh: 在日本并网运行的BESS须符合《系统连系技术要件指导方针》（JEAC 9701，由日本电气协会发布，经METI引用），该指南规定了分布式发电和储能系统接入公用电网的技术要求，涵盖保护继电器设定、电压调节、频率响应、断开要求及防孤岛要求。并网前须取得当地电力公司（输电系统运营商）的正式并网批准。超过特定阈值的大型并网储能项目，可能还须依据《电气事业法》取得METI额外批准。
summary.zht: 在日本並網運行的BESS須符合《系統連系技術要件指導方針》（JEAC 9701，由日本電氣協會發布，經METI引用），該指南規定了分布式發電和儲能系統接入公用電網的技術要求，涵蓋保護繼電器設定、電壓調節、頻率響應、斷開要求及防孤島要求。並網前須取得當地電力公司（輸電系統運營商）的正式並網批准。超過特定閾值的大型並網儲能項目，可能還須依據《電氣事業法》取得METI額外批准。

standards_or_laws: JEAC 9701 — 系統連系技術要件ガイドライン (Grid Interconnection Technical Requirements Guidelines), Japan Electric Association
電気事業法 (Electricity Business Act) — large-scale generation/storage approval by METI

summary.en: China's grid interconnection requirements for ESS are set by GB/T 36547-2018 (Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Power Grid) and grid operator (State Grid / CSG) enterprise standards. Approval is granted by the relevant grid operator. Chinese grid interconnection standards differ in technical requirements, approval process, and regulatory structure from JEAC 9701 and Japanese utility interconnection agreements.
summary.zh: 中国储能系统并网要求由GB/T 36547-2018（电化学储能系统接入电网技术规定）及电网运营商（国家电网/南方电网）企业标准确定，相关批准由所在地电网运营商授予。中国电网互联标准在技术要求、审批流程和监管结构上与JEAC 9701及日本电力公司并网协议存在差异。
summary.zht: 中國儲能系統並網要求由GB/T 36547-2018（電化學儲能系統接入電網技術規定）及電網運營商（國家電網/南方電網）企業標準確定，相關批准由所在地電網運營商授予。中國電網互聯標準在技術要求、審批流程和監管結構上與JEAC 9701及日本電力公司並網協議存在差異。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36547-2018 — 电化学储能系统接入电网技术规定 (Technical requirements for electrochemical energy storage system connected to power grid)

gap.en: Chinese BESS exported to Japan for grid-connected applications must comply with JEAC 9701 technical requirements and obtain formal interconnection approval from the Japanese local utility before commissioning. GB/T 36547 compliance documentation does not substitute for JEAC 9701 compliance or Japanese utility interconnection approval. System protection relay settings, anti-islanding functions, and frequency/voltage response parameters must be configured to Japanese grid standards, which differ from Chinese grid parameters.
gap.zh: 出口至日本用于并网应用的中国BESS，须在投运前符合JEAC 9701技术要求，并取得日本当地电力公司的正式并网批准。GB/T 36547合规文件不能替代JEAC 9701合规证明或日本电力公司并网批准。系统保护继电器设定、防孤岛功能及频率/电压响应参数须按日本电网标准配置，与中国电网参数存在差异。
gap.zht: 出口至日本用於並網應用的中國BESS，須在投運前符合JEAC 9701技術要求，並取得日本當地電力公司的正式並網批准。GB/T 36547合規文件不能替代JEAC 9701合規證明或日本電力公司並網批准。系統保護繼電器設定、防孤島功能及頻率/電壓響應參數須按日本電網標準配置，與中國電網參數存在差異。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected BESS; interconnection approval required from local utility before commissioning
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory compliance with GB/T 36547-2018 and grid operator specifications for grid-connected ESS in China

source.publisher: Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry (METI), Japan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Grid-connected Chinese BESS in Japan must comply with JEAC 9701 and obtain utility interconnection approval. Chinese GB/T 36547 documentation does not substitute. System configuration (protection relay settings, anti-islanding, grid parameters) must be adapted to Japanese standards. Engage the local Japanese utility early in project development.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在日本并网运行的中国BESS须符合JEAC 9701并取得电力公司并网批准。中国GB/T 36547文件不能替代。系统配置（保护继电器设定、防孤岛、电网参数）须按日本标准调整。项目开发早期应尽早与日本当地电力公司沟通。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在日本並網運行的中國BESS須符合JEAC 9701並取得電力公司並網批准。中國GB/T 36547文件不能替代。系統配置（保護繼電器設定、防孤島、電網參數）須按日本標準調整。項目開發早期應儘早與日本當地電力公司溝通。
